objective: Diagnose stalled lifecycle — no SimulatedTrade closes in 7 days
background: Zero SimulatedTrade closes in the last 7 days despite 84 open/pending trades. Exit criteria may be broken or signal thresholds are unreachable.
constraints: Do not force-close trades with arbitrary PnL values
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Exit trigger logic traced end-to-end and breakage point identified
At least 1 trade manually reviewed for why it has not closed
Exit criteria verified to be reachable with current price data
Write lifecycle health report to docs/reports/lifecycle_health.md
required_outputs: Exit trigger logic traced end-to-end and breakage point identified
At least 1 trade manually reviewed for why it has not closed
Exit criteria verified to be reachable with current price data
Write lifecycle health report to docs/reports/lifecycle_health.md
forbidden_changes: Do not force-close trades with arbitrary PnL values
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
